title: National AI exposure with enrichment variables
description: Country-level structural AI exposure scores with coverage, reliability, income, wage, labor-share, and white-collar variables.

title: National AI exposure by sex
description: Country-level structural AI exposure scores by sex and total workforce where measured.

title: ISCO-08 2-digit exposure scores
description: Occupation-level exposure scores aggregated to ISCO-08 2-digit occupations.

title: Gender exposure gap
description: Country-level male and female exposure estimates and measured gender exposure gaps.

title: Gender gap white-collar decomposition
description: Country-level decomposition used to quantify how much white-collar composition explains measured gender exposure gaps.

title: Gender gap white-collar plus sales decomposition
description: Country-level decomposition used to quantify how much white-collar plus sales composition explains measured gender exposure gaps.

title: White-collar exposure decomposition
description: Country-level white-collar shares and white-collar / blue-collar exposure components.

title: White-collar boundary sensitivity
description: Sensitivity of the exposure relationship to alternative white-collar / blue-collar occupational boundaries.

title: Wage-weighted exposure
description: Country-level exposure estimates with available ISCO wage weighting.

title: Labor share enrichment
description: Labor-share data used to contextualize exposure through national labor dependence.

title: Occupation contributions
description: Country-occupation contribution table used to decompose national exposure.

title: Alternative occupational exposure estimates
description: ISCO-level comparison of primary Gmyrek scores with the Eloundou et al. exposure estimate.

title: Alternative national exposure estimates
description: National exposure recomputed under the Eloundou et al. occupational exposure measure.

title: White-collar boundary robustness
description: Robustness table for exposure results under alternative occupation-boundary definitions.

title: Observed adoption gap
description: Country-level table comparing structural exposure with observed adoption/usage measures where available.

title: Occupation-level validation
description: Occupation-level validation table for exposure and observed AI use patterns.

title: Observed outcomes versus exposure
description: Paper Section 6 country-level analysis table for observed AI usage/adoption outcomes.

title: Observed outcomes versus exposure statistics
description: Model statistics for Section 6 observed AI usage/adoption outcome fits.

title: Adoption predictor R-squared grid
description: R-squared grid for three adoption outcomes and eight predictor combinations.

source_stage: official Microsoft GitHub source with ISO-code match
title: Microsoft AI Diffusion country adoption
description: Official Microsoft AI Diffusion country/economy adoption rates for H1 2025, H2 2025, and Q1 2026, matched to ISO alpha-3 codes.

title: Adoption regression appendix table
description: Coefficient-level OLS results for adoption-predictivity appendix models.

title: Exposure regression appendix table
description: Coefficient-level OLS results for exposure-predictivity appendix models.

title: Remittance-weighted exposure
description: Country-level direct and remittance-accounted exposure estimates used in the indirect exposure section.

title: Remittance enrichment data
description: Derived remittance summary variables used for indirect exposure analysis.

title: World Bank region-income exposure grid
description: Complete 7 region by 4 income-group exposure grid using measured exposure data and no imputation.

title: Region exposure marginals
description: Regional marginal exposure aggregates with macro and labor-force-weighted estimates.

title: Income exposure marginals
description: Income-group marginal exposure aggregates with macro and labor-force-weighted estimates.

title: World Bank group exclusions
description: Countries excluded from World Bank group exposure aggregates because measured exposure or classification data were unavailable.

title: National exposure map data
description: Country-level table used for the national exposure map.

title: Sample coverage summary
description: Paper sample coverage summary table.

title: Country exclusion lists
description: Country exclusion lists and reasons used in paper sample accounting.

title: Structural baseline metrics
description: Paper-facing structural baseline statistics.

title: Cross-country labor composition
description: Paper-facing table for labor composition and national exposure patterns.

title: Validation stack compact table
description: Compact paper-facing validation summary table.

title: Gmyrek hierarchy summary
description: Paper-facing summary of the task-to-occupation aggregation hierarchy used to construct national AI exposure.

title: Remittance corridor evidence
description: Selected derived corridor evidence table for paper narrative claims, using KNOMAD 2021 bilateral remittance flows and World Bank 2024 remittance indicators where available.

title: Exposure predictor country panel
description: Country-level predictor panel used to reproduce appendix exposure regressions, including white-collar share, log GNI, internet penetration, and O*NET cognitive-minus-physical score.

title: Alternative exposure aggregate summary
description: Aggregate robustness correlations for alternative occupational exposure measures. H&L transformed score vectors are not redistributed because no standalone open-data redistribution license was identified.

title: Gender decomposition summary
description: R-squared summary for white-collar and white-collar-plus-sales decompositions of measured gender exposure gaps.

title: OpenAI rank quintile summary
description: Derived top/bottom exposure-quintile summary comparing national exposure ranks with OpenAI Signals matched-sample ranks.
